name_en: Bottega Veneta 24 Spring Fashion (🐍Python) Evening Bag, Unbranded, Shining as well. This evening bag is colorful and eye-catching, while the petal craftsmanship reveals the prosperity of spring. Original leather + stainless steel hardware + 24k gold plating + fully handmade. Those who know our brand history should have heard of the knot, which is a story of Bottega Veneta and one of its important perfect designs. Model No.: 754614(717622) Dimensions: 20.5*6*12.5
